title: Lacquered Kenyan Grape Pudding
description: A jammy, aerated dessert that evokes Kenyan nostalgia, featuring grape juice, a glossy lacquer glaze, and anti-inflammatory spices.
instructions: Combine grape juice and sugar in a saucepan and heat until the sugar has dissolved.
Add vanilla, ginger, and turmeric and stir for 30 seconds.
Remove the saucepan from heat and allow the mixture to cool to 80°F.
Whisk gelatin powder into 1/4 cup cold water until fully dispersed.
Stir the gelatin mixture into the warm grape mixture until fully incorporated.
Pour the mixture into a shallow dish, cover, and refrigerate for 180 minutes until set.
Whisk honey in a small bowl then brush it over the set pudding to create a lacquer glaze.
Let the glaze set for 10 minutes.
Sprinkle crushed almonds over the glaze and garnish with mint leaves.
Serve chilled for a nostalgic Kenyan dessert experience.
